required_contains.text: ## TAO Halving Does Not Halve Alpha Rewards
In Dynamic TAO, a TAO halving can reduce TAO injection into subnet pools and the matched alpha
injection alongside it, but the halving documentation states that alpha rewards paid to miners,
validators, and subnet owners do not halve from a TAO halving alone
This keeps TAO-halving language separate from alpha-halving language. A subnet alpha halving is the
